view_title: ขยายทับหลัง (1:10) + ขยายเสา C1 (1:20) + ขยายคานคอดิน GB (1:20) -- fence type 2 lintel, column, and ground-beam rebar expansion details

elements.description: ขยายทับหลัง -- 0.10x0.20m RC lintel, main bar 2-Ø6mm, tie ป.Ø6mm@0.15m
ขยายเสา C1 -- 0.20x0.20m column, main bar 4-Ø12mm, stirrup STR:Ø6mm@150mm
ขยายคานคอดิน GB -- 0.20x0.30m ground beam, top bar 2-Ø9mm, bottom bar 2-Ø9mm+1-Ø9mm bent L/5, stirrup STR:Ø6mm@150mm

warnings: Third of 3 views on this page; siblings are the plan/elevation (_view1_fence_type2_plan_elevation.json) and fence section (_view2_fence_type2_section.json).
Column C1 and ground beam GB rebar specs are IDENTICAL to fence type 1's (A-25) -- both fence types share the same structural frame, differing only in infill.
This is the final view of the final architecture sheet (A-26 of 26). All architecture pages (3-28) for this house are now complete.
